description: Archive remains record state carried by the value node rather than a delete operation.
Archived value nodes may still appear in snapshots so clients can reconstruct the full known state.
Archived value nodes may still be emitted in `set` events with `--archived` present in the payload options.
Archive retention is indefinite by default at the protocol level.
Physical cleanup or compaction of archived nodes is an implementation-specific concern rather than a protocol guarantee.
